name: Guerrilla RF, Inc.
business: Guerrilla RF is a fabless semiconductor company that designs and sells high-performance MMIC products for wireless connectivity to customers in wireless infrastructure, automotive, and catalog markets.
sellsTo: Catalog markets (satellite navigation, cellular repeaters, point-to-point radios, defense, test and measurement, etc.)
namedCustomers: RFMW, a division of Exponential Technology Group, Inc.

exposures.sentence: Guerrilla RF is a fabless semiconductor company based in Greensboro, NC.
We support wireless infrastructure OEMs worldwide with a comprehensive portfolio of RF solutions covering all major frequency bands below 7 GHz.
Our Satellite Communication (SatCom) solutions enable seamless connectivity between satellite and cellular infrastructure.
We offer a comprehensive range of automotive RF connectivity solutions, including low-noise amplifiers (LNAs), linear driver amplifiers, switches, power amplifiers (PAs), and front-end modules.
our RF solutions enhance RFID/asset tracking and defense radios by enabling longer battery life and improved signal coverage.
